lead.description: AMA | Rochester is the only local professional organization run by marketers for marketers. We provide our members with a national educational resource, offer high quality, educational seminars, networking opportunities, and a Marketer of the Year competition (The Pinnacle Awards), all to give members the knowledge they need to succeed in the ever changing marketing industry.
